vocab.example: I can spend hours in a gallery just marveling at the intricate brushwork of Renaissance paintings.

vocab.meaning: học thử/làm quen (một cách không chuyên)
vocab.example: Although I'm not a professional, I like to dabble in watercolor painting during my spare time.
Abstract art often evokes a sense of tranquility that I find incredibly healing after a long day.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng/đắm mình trong (không khí, vẻ đẹp)
vocab.example: Whenever I travel, I love to soak up the local culture by visiting contemporary art exhibitions.
I once stumbled upon a small street art alley that completely changed my perspective on graffiti.
Surrealist pieces often conjure up vivid dreams and help broaden my imagination.

vocab.meaning: dồn hết (tâm huyết, nỗ lực) vào
vocab.example: You can really feel the raw emotion that the sculptor poured into this marble masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: dần dần khiến ai đó thấy thích
vocab.example: I wasn't a fan of modern art at first, but it has really started to grow on me lately.

vocab.meaning: ôn lại/trau dồi lại kiến thức
vocab.example: I’m planning to brush up on my art history knowledge before visiting the Louvre next month.
The use of vibrant colors makes this particular installation stand out from the rest of the collection.
